entries.source: A capable learning companion should not depend on geography, family income, or whether a learner already knows the right person to ask.

entries.source: Default guest tutor

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.
entries.value: Verschillende leertake wat verskillende interaksievormen nodig, daarom gebruik inspir aktief, modusspesifiek onderrig. 'n huiswerkwenk, Sokratiese vraag, historiese simulatie, flitskaartherhaling en schrijfkritiek horen homself nie te gedragen as dieselfde generieke chat.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different shapes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and study planning.
entries.value: Verschillende leertake wat verskillende vormen nodig: Sokratiese vrae, huiswerkwenke, flitskaarte, debat, historiese rolspellen, schrijfkritiek en studiebebeplanning.

entries.value: Elke leermodus wat 'n openbare URL, zodat leerders vanuit zoektake direk in die regte leerervaring kan binnenkomen.

entries.source: Evaluate a public AI learning layer first, then explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, content alignment, and usage funding.

entries.source: How inspir handles public guest learning pages, private saved chats, crawler access, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Hoe inspir openbare gaanstleerbladsye, privé gestoor chats, crawlertoegang, leerderveiligheid en skoolvertroue hanteer.

entries.value: Hoe verskil inspir van 'n generiese AI-kletsbot?

entries.source: How public guest learning can extend into school-specific AI learning spaces.
entries.value: Hoe openbaar gaanstleer kan doorgroeien na skoolspesifieke AI-leerruimtes.

entries.source: Identify the school goals that matter most: conceptual support, homework hints, exam prep, active recall, writing feedback, or enrichment.
entries.value: Bepaal die skooldoelen wat wat belangrikst is: conceptuele ondersteuning, huiswerkwenke, eksamenvoorbereiding, active recall, skryferugvoer of verdieping.

entries.source: inspir began in 2013 as a public quiz and learning community, grew through schools and student networks, and later developed AI learning infrastructure and public AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: inspir begon in 2013 as 'n openbare vasvra- en leergemeenskap, het gegroei via skole en studenteetwerken en ontwikkelde later AI-leerinfrastruktuur en openbare AI-tutorervaringen.

entries.source: inspir crawler and indexing policy
entries.value: crawler- en indexeringsbeleid van inspir

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.
entries.value: inspir bestaan om leer toeganklik, boeiend, aangenaam en nuttig te maak vir almal met nuusgierigheid via gratis openbare AI-leerhulpmiddels en skoolklare leerruimtes.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir is 'n gratis AI-leerplatform met openbare gasmodusse vir verduideliking, Sokratiese begeleiding, huiswerkafrigtering, vasvrae, flitskaarte, debat, rolspel, skryferugvoer en studiebebeplanning.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir is 'n gratis AI-leerplatform met openbare gasmodusse vir verduideliking, Sokratiese begeleiding, huiswerkafrigtering, vasvrae, flitskaarte, debat, skryferugvoer, hulp by kodeer en studiebebeplanning.

entries.source: inspir is designed around reasoning, practice, recall, and explanation instead of handing learners finished work.
entries.value: inspir is ontwerp rondom redeneer, oefen, herinneren en verduidelik in plaas van leerders kant-en-gereed werk te gee.

entries.source: inspir is organized around hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, review, and explanation instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: inspir is georgaanniseerd rondom wenke, vrae, vasvrae, flitskaarte, debat, herhaling en verduideliking in plaas van passief antwoorde kopieer.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, maths steps, writing critique, and exam planning, so students land in a more focused learning behavior.
entries.value: inspir is georgaanniseerd rondom leermodusse soos Sokratiese begeleiding, huiswerkwenke, vasvrae, flitskaarte, wiskundestappe, schrijfkritiek en examenbeplanning, zodat studente in gefokusder leergedrag teregkomen.

entries.source: inspir makes learning modes public and indexable at /chat/{topicSlug}, letting learners land directly inside the right AI learning experience without needing a saved private chat.
entries.value: inspir maak leermodusse openbaar en indekseerbaar op /chat/{topicSlug}, zodat leerders direk in die regte AI-leerervaring kan lande sonder 'n gestoor privaatchat nodig te wat.

entries.source: inspir organizes AI around active learning behaviors: hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, critique, and review.
entries.value: inspir orgaanniseert AI rondom aktiewe leergedragingen: wenke, vrae, vasvrae, flitskaarte, kritiek en herhaling.

entries.source: inspir organizes AI around learning modes with specific teaching behavior: explanations, Socratic questions, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir orgaanniseert AI rondom leermodusse met spesifiek onderwijsgedrag: verduideliking, Sokratiese vrae, huiswerkwenke, vasvrae, flitskaarte, debat, rolspel, skryferugvoer en studiebebeplanning.

entries.source: inspir public trust safeguards
entries.value: openbare vertroueswaarborgen van inspir

entries.source: inspir separates public guest learning pages from private saved conversations, so learners, schools, search engines, and AI answer engines can understand what is meant to be public.
entries.value: inspir scheidt openbare gaanstleerbladsye van privé gestoor gesprekken, zodat leerders, skole, soekenjins en AI-antwoordmasjiene begrijpen wat bedoel is om openbaar te is.

entries.source: inspir started as a Facebook page publishing quizzes and building a habit of extracurricular learning.
entries.value: inspir begon as 'n Facebookbladsy wat vasvrae publiceerde en 'n gewoonte van buitenskools leer opbouwde.

entries.source: inspir supports search and AI retrieval for public learning pages. Training crawlers and private or operational surfaces are treated differently.
entries.value: inspir ondersteunt zoeken en AI-retrieval vir openbare leerbladsye. Trainingcrawlers en privé- of operationele oppervlakken word anders behandeld.

entries.source: inspir went live as a consumer-facing AI learning product within weeks of ChatGPT's public release.

entries.source: Private saved chat URLs are not sitemap-listed and are not included in llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or the JSON AI content catalog.

entries.source: Product angle
entries.value: Produkhoek

entries.source: Public explanation of guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Openbare verduideliking oor gasmodus, privaatchats, kruipbeleid, leerderveiligheid en skoolvertroue.

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Openbare gasmodusse gee almal 'n nuttige plek om te starten, terwyl skool- en vennootimplementaties die ervaring kan aanpas aan lokale behoeften.

entries.source: Public guest-mode URLs exist so learners can land directly in useful learning modes from search, social links, schools, and AI answer engines.
entries.value: Openbare gasmodus-URL's bestaan zodat leerders regstreeks in nuttige leermodusse kan lande vanuit zoektake, sociale skakels, skole en AI-antwoordmasjiene.

entries.source: Public learning should be discoverable without making private chats public.
entries.value: Openbaar leer moet vindbaar is sonder privaatchats openbaar te maak.

entries.source: Public pages are open to search and AI retrieval crawlers, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities are disallowed.
entries.value: Openbare bladsye staan oopmaak vir zoek- en AI-retrievalcrawlers, terwyl beheerhulpmiddels, API-roetes, resetflows en private hulpprogramme is uitgesloten.

entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and authority pages are intended to be discoverable.
entries.value: Openbare bladsye, onderwerpchats, leerpaden, bloggidsen en autoriteitsbladsye is bedoel om vindbaar te is.

entries.source: Robots rules allow Google, standard search crawlers, and major AI discovery crawlers on public pages, while blocking API routes, admin routes, and reset flows.
entries.value: Robotsregels staan Google, standaardzoekcrawlers en grote AI-discoverycrawlers by op openbare bladsye, terwyl API-roetes, beheerroetes en resetflows word geblokkeerd.

entries.source: Safeguards
entries.value: Waarborgen

entries.source: Saved user conversations use private identifiers, are not included in the sitemap or AI discovery files, and should not be treated as public source material.
entries.value: Opgeslaag gebruikersgesprekken gebruik privé-ID's, is nie opgenomen in die sitemap of AI-discoveryleers en moet nie word behandeld as openbaar bronmateriaal.

entries.value: Scholen en vennote kan vanuit wat openbare produk bouwen richting aangepaste, vertroulike en gesubsidieerde implementaties.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate inspir through public guest modes first, then explore tailored AI learning spaces with custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, and funded access paths.
entries.value: Scholen kan inspir eers via openbare gasmodusse evalueren en daarna aangepaste AI-leerruimtes verkennen met maatwerkwerkvloeie, vertroulikheidsbeplanning, kurrikulumbehoeften en paden vir gefinansiere toegang.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: Scholen kan eers openbare modusse evalueren en daarna maatwerkwerkvloeie, vertroulikheidsbeplanning, inhoudbehoeften en gefinansiere toegang bepraat.

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Scholen kan eers openbare gasmodusse testen en daarna die skolebladsy gebruik om maatwerkwerkvloeie, vertroulikheidsbeplanning, NCERT-afgestemde opsies en gefinansiere toegang te verkennen.

entries.value: Begin vanuit 'n openbare leermodus met duidelike grenzen.

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Begin leer

entries.source: Students
entries.value: Studente

entries.source: Study workflows that connect guest modes, prompts, practice, and related guides.
entries.value: Studiewerkvloeie wat gasmodusse, prompts, oefening en verwante gidse verbinden.

entries.source: Support funded AI learning access for communities that need high-quality support without adding cost to families.
entries.value: Ondersteun gefinansiere toegang tot AI-leer vir gemeenskappen wat hoogwaardige ondersteuning nodig wat sonder extra koste vir gesinne.

entries.source: Syndicated coverage for wider consumer reach.
entries.value: Gesyndiceerde dekking vir 'n groter consumentenbereik.

entries.source: Teachers
entries.value: Onderwysers

entries.source: Teachers and leaders can start with Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards before a formal rollout.
entries.value: Docenten en leiders kan begin met Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, vasvrae en flitskaarte voordat er 'n formele uitrol kom.

entries.source: Terms
entries.value: Voorwaardes

entries.source: Text-first discovery file for AI answer engines, assistants, educators, and citation tools.
entries.value: Tekstgefokus discoveryleer vir AI-antwoordmasjiene, assistenten, onderwysers en citatiehulpmiddels.

entries.source: The app is organized around teaching behaviors such as Socratic questioning, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, roleplay, and planning.
entries.value: Die app is georgaanniseerd rondom onderwijsgedrag soos Sokraties vrae vra, huiswerkwenke, vasvrae, flitskaarte, rolspel en beplanning.

entries.source: The community expanded through schools, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes, and learner communities.
entries.value: Die gemeenskap het gegroei via skole, universiteite, competities, buitenskoolse programme en leergemeenskappen.

entries.source: The formal privacy page for data use, rights, and public service conditions.
entries.value: Die formele privaatheidbladsy vir datagebruik, regte en openbare diensvoorwaardes.

entries.source: The formal terms covering acceptable use, account responsibilities, and service conditions.
entries.value: Die formele voorwaardes oor aanvaardbaar gebruik, rekeningverantwoordelikheden en diensvoorwaardes.

entries.source: The goal is discovery and citation of public learning pages. Public routes, guides, and learning hubs are open to major AI search, retrieval, and assistant crawlers, while API, admin, reset, and private utility routes stay disallowed.
entries.value: Die doel is ontdekking en citatie van openbare leerbladsye. Publieke roetes, gidse en leerhubs staan oopmaak vir grote AI-zoek-, retrieval- en assistentcrawlers, terwyl API-, admin-, reset- en private utilityroetes geweigerd bly.

entries.source: The live robots rules used by search crawlers and AI retrieval systems.
entries.value: Die lewendig robots-regels wat deur zoekcrawlers en AI-retrievalsystemen word gebruik.

entries.source: The live, crawlable learning surface that turns the mission into product behavior.
entries.value: Die lewendig, crawlbare leeroppervlak dat die missie omstap in produkgedrag.

entries.source: The next phase is open-source, contributor-friendly, and connected to the wider international buildout at inspir.uk.
entries.value: Die volgende fase is oopmaak-source, toeganklik vir bijdragers en verbonden met die breere internasionale uitbouw op inspir.uk.

entries.source: The open-source rebuild for developers, educators, and contributors.
entries.value: Die oopmaak-source herbouw vir ontwikkelaars, onderwysers en bijdragers.

entries.source: The platform worked on curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured learning flows, and early AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: Die platform gewerk aan kurrikulum-inname, retrieval, gestruktureerdee leervloei en vroege AI-tutoringervaringen.

entries.source: The practical trust layer behind guest mode.
entries.value: Die praktiese vertroueslaag agter gasmodus.

entries.source: The public blog contains more than 100 guides, prompt loops, and pillar clusters connected to live learning modes.
entries.value: Die openbare blog bevat meer dan 100 gidse, promptlusse en pijlerclusters wat verbonden is met lewendig leermodusse.

entries.source: The public explanation of why inspir exists and why learning access matters.
entries.value: Die openbare verduideliking waarom inspir bestaan en waarom toegang tot leer belangrik is.

entries.source: The public modes are designed around learning behavior: hints, Socratic questions, step checks, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, review loops, and active explanation.
entries.value: Die openbare modusse is ontwerp rondom leergedrag: wenke, Sokratiese vrae, stapkontroles, vasvrae, flitskaarte, skryferugvoer, herhalingslusse en aktiewe verduideliking.

entries.source: The public product is easy to try first, while schools and partners can explore tailored deployments for community needs.
entries.value: Die openbare produk is maklik eers uit te probeer, terwyl skole en vennote op maat gemaakte implementaties vir gemeenskapsbehoeften kan verkennen.

entries.source: The public product keeps learning easy to try, while schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Die openbare produk houdt leer maklik uit te probeer, terwyl skole en CSR-vennote maatwerkimplementaties kan ondersteun wanneer gemeenskappen vertroulikheid, kurrikulumafstemming of gefinansiere toegang nodig wat.

entries.source: The public statement of why inspir exists and what learning access means.
entries.value: Die openbare verklaring waarom inspir bestaan en wat toegang tot leer beteken.

entries.source: The school pathway for tailored AI learning spaces and funded access.
entries.value: Die skoolpad vir op maat gemaakte AI-leerruimtes en gefinansiere toegang.

entries.source: The SEO system is designed to make useful public learning resources findable while keeping private user material, admin surfaces, and utility routes outside discovery.
entries.value: Die SEO-systeem is ontwerp om nuttige openbare leerbronne vindbaar te maak en tegelyk privaatgebruikersmateriaal, adminoppervlakken en utilityroetes buite ontdekking te hou.

entries.source: The source links search systems and schools can inspect.
entries.value: Die bronskakels wat zoeksystemen en skole kan inspecteren.

entries.source: The story from quizzes and student communities to free AI learning tools built in public.
entries.value: Die storie van vasvrae en studentegemeenskappen na gratis AI-leerhulpmiddels wat in die openbare word gebou.

entries.source: The story spans quizzes, offline school networks, curriculum ingestion, and public AI learning modes.
entries.value: Die storie sluit in vasvrae, offline skoolnetwerken, kurrikulum-inname en openbare AI-leermodusse.

entries.source: The strongest angle is free public AI learning that opens directly in guest mode and keeps learners active through mode-specific teaching rather than generic answer generation.
entries.value: Die sterkste invalshoek is gratis openbaar AI-leer dat direk in gasmodus oopmaak en leerders aktief houdt via modusspesifiek onderrig in plaas van generieke antwoordgenerasie.

entries.source: The wider international buildout connected to the inspir project.
entries.value: Die breere internasionale uitbouw wat verbonden is met wat inspir-projek.

entries.source: The written learning library that supports prompts, study loops, and long-tail discovery.
entries.value: Die geskryf leerbiblioteek wat prompts, studielusse en long-tail-ontdekking ondersteunt.

entries.source: These public files explain what should be indexed, what should not, and where the formal policies live.
entries.value: Hierdie openbare leers leggen uit wat geïndexeerd moet word, wat nie, en waar die formele beleidsregels staan.

entries.source: These safeguards connect product behavior, private boundaries, crawler rules, and school deployment needs into one public explanation.
entries.value: Hierdie waarborgen verbinden produkgedrag, privaatgrenzen, crawlerregels en behoeften rondom skoolimplementatie in een openbare verduideliking.

entries.source: Trust
entries.value: Geloofwaardigheid

entries.source: Trust and crawler policy
entries.value: Vertrouwen en kruipbeleid

entries.value: Vertrouwen en veiligheid

entries.value: Vertrouwen en veiligheid

entries.source: Trust questions for learners, schools, and crawlers.
entries.value: Vertrouwensvrae vir leerders, skole en crawlers.

entries.source: Trust safeguard
entries.value: Vertrouwenswaarborg

entries.source: Try public guest modes
entries.value: Probeer openbare gasmodusse

entries.source: Understanding over answers
entries.value: Begrip bo antwoorde

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: In teenstelling tot 'n generieke chatbot orgaanniseert inspir AI rondom leermodusse, zodat leerders kan begin met wat soort hulp dat hulle nodig wat: wenke, vrae, vasvrae, aktiewe herroeping, rolspel, debat of terugvoer.

entries.source: Use https://inspirlearning.com for the site, /mission for the mission, /topics for the public learning mode directory, and /chat/learn-anything for the default guest learning experience.
entries.value: Gebruik https://inspirlearning.com vir die site, /mission vir die missie, /topics vir die openbare leermodusdirectory en /chat/learn-anything vir die standaard gaanstleerervaring.

entries.source: Use this for school, partner, CSR, and education access references.
entries.value: Gebruik hierdie vir verwijzingen na skool-, vennoot-, CSR- en onderwijstoegang.

entries.source: Use this when citing the long-form guide library, study prompts, and mode-specific articles.
entries.value: Gebruik hierdie by wat citeren van die uitgebreide gidsbiblioteek, studieprompts en modusspesifieke artikelen.

entries.source: Use this when describing the full set of guest-mode learning tools that are meant to be indexed.
entries.value: Gebruik hierdie by wat beskryf van die volledige set gasmodus-leerhulpmiddels wat bedoel is om geindexeerd te word.

entries.source: Use this when introducing inspir as the main product or linking from a directory, profile, or article.
entries.value: Gebruik hierdie wanneer jy inspir introduceert as wat hoofdproduk of linkt vanuit 'n directory, profiel of artikel.

entries.source: Use this when linking readers straight into the live learning experience.
entries.value: Gebruik hierdie wanneer jy lezers direk na die lewendig leerervaring linkt.

entries.source: Use this when referencing public/private boundaries, crawler policy, and school trust.
entries.value: Gebruik hierdie wanneer jy verwijst na openbare/private grenzen, kruipbeleid en skoolvertroue.

entries.value: Wie kan die mediabladsy gebruik?

entries.source: Why does inspir allow AI discovery crawlers?
entries.value: Waarom staat inspir AI-discovery-crawlers by?

entries.source: Why does inspir support school and partner deployments?
entries.value: Waarom ondersteunt inspir skool- en vennootimplementaties?

entries.source: Why is inspir built around modes instead of one chat box?
entries.value: Waarom is inspir gebou rondom modusse in plaas van 'n chatbox?

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: Ja. 'n skool kan begin met wat testen van openbare modusse en daarna na 'n pilot of aangepaste implementatie gaan wanneer die usegeval, inhoudsbehoeften en financieringsroete duidelik is.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: Ja. Publieke gasmodusse soos Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, vasvrae en flitskaarte oopmaak direk vanaf kanonieke /chat/{topicSlug}-URL's.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: Ja. Publieke onderwerp-toegangspunte soos /chat/learn-anything en /chat/socratic-instruction is bedoel as indexeerbare leerbladsye.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Ja. Die openbare gasmodusse laat skoolleiders en onderwysers die leerervaring probeer voordat hulle 'n skoolimplementatie op maat bepraat.
